objective: Objectif: "Analyse les variations de volatilité avec l'indicateur `vortex` et le temps d'horodatage en heures (`1h`) pour le token FETUSDC. Utilisez la combinaison des indicateurs `EMA`, `momentum`, `standard_deviation`, ainsi que le filtre anti-faux-signaux `confirmation inverse partielle` et l'entrée `volatilite > 0.2`. Gère les risques en utilisant une stop loss de 3% (`SL`) et un take profit de 1%. Rejette les formulations génériques typiques comme 'RSI < 30'.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining the volatility-based ATR indicator with RSI and Bollinger bands to identify trend reversals in 1 hour FETUSDC data.

code.validation_error: Indicateur(s) inconnu(s) via indicators détecté(s): ['easiest']. Utiliser uniquement les noms du registre.
code.validation_error_retry: [AST001] Erreur de syntaxe ligne 82: unterminated string literal (detected at line 82)

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy aims to identify trend reversals in 1 hour FETUSDC data by combining ATR, EMA, and standard deviation indicators with RSI. The filter for volatility is also included using the condition 'volatility > 0.2'. The entry long condition uses EMA(close) which may not be optimal for identifying trends due to its lagging nature. If results are poor (negative return), changing the EMA(close) conditions or adding other trend indicators such as moving averages could be considered. For mediocre returns, adjusting stop loss and take profit values might improve performance. An alternative approach would be trying different technical indicators or expanding the timeframe for analysis.
[Backup plan] ['For negative results: 
- Change the EMA(close) conditions to use exponential or smoothed moving average instead of simple moving average.
- Add other trend indicators such as moving averages and Bollinger bands.

For mediocre results: 
- Adjust stop loss and take profit values.']
